Short CV

He was born in İstanbul, 1961. He graduated from İstanbul Male High School in 1979, from İstanbul Faculty of Medicine in 1985. He completed his medical specialty in the field of Family Practice in İstanbul Beyoğlu Education and Research Hospital, his doctorate education in the field of Public Health in İstanbul University and his postgraduate education in the field of Health Management in Germany Hannover Faculty of Medicine.

He completed his obligatory governmental service in Mardin Midyat Community Health Center. He works as Deputy Chief Physician in İstanbul Beyoğlu Education and Research Hospital and as Deputy Provincial Health Director in İstanbul Provincial Health Directorate. He founded the Department of Paramedics in Marmara University. He worked as manager in a national level well-organized firm in the field of Occupational Health. He has many speeches in various national and international scientific meetings and many publications.
